title: Lanostry's journey
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2696fdc934db94cc8f135e0b817f6799d00272e8_0.webp)
### Description

This resource pack was created to give the game a new look
It is currently in beta, but more content will be added with each update

What's available right now:

- Randomization for most blocks (grass, ore, stone, etc.)
- Unique texture for each type of planks
- Ability to create new blocks and vertical floor planks from two slabs (currently only available for slabs and bamboo mosaic)
- 16 variations for carved pumpkins and jack-o'-lanterns
- Partially updated overworld and some items

### Recommendations

Use optifine or EMF, ETF, Continity, CIT, Sodium, CEM  and more to run the resourcepack

If you want to enable lush foliage, install [this](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/journey_leaves)

If you want to add mobs or other projects of mine, go [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Lanostry)


### Terms of use

I forbid you to use my resourcepacks/mods for commercial purposes, to use them in third-party projects, paid modpacks, on public servers with paid pass or donation, as well as to distribute them on other sites It is also forbidden to use textures from my projects for training neural networks
If you want to use my projects in your modpacks, you must credit me as the author and share a portion of the revenue from downloads
For other uses (videos, articles, etc.), please provide a link to the download (modrinth or curseforge)
All of this works with the full or modified package, as well as if you use only part of the content
